channel.title: CrackTheDeck Blog
channel.description: Expert insights on pitch decks, fundraising strategy, and investor psychology from the CrackTheDeck team.

item.title: Anatomy of a Perfect Pitch Deck: The 10 Slides That Actually Matter
item.description: What Sequoia, a16z, and Y Combinator actually look for in a pitch deck. A slide-by-slide breakdown based on real frameworks from top VC firms.

item.title: 7 Pitch Deck Mistakes That Make Investors Say No (Before Slide 5)
item.description: The most common pitch deck mistakes that kill fundraising rounds. Based on real VC feedback and post-mortem analysis of failed rounds.
